## Summary

<!-- Describe what changed and why. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## User-visible changes

- [ ] No user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Commands/settings/README/diagnostics changed
- [ ] HUD/status bar behavior changed
- [ ] Native helper behavior changed
- [ ] VSIX packaged files or Marketplace metadata changed

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` when behavior or packaging changed.
- [ ] I updated README/docs when commands, settings, support behavior, or troubleshooting changed.
- [ ] I updated manifest localization files when user-facing `package.json` strings changed.
- [ ] I used real screenshots/GIFs for visual Marketplace/HUD changes, or explained why no screenshot is needed.
- [ ] I considered privacy/security impact: file contents, clipboard contents, typed text, telemetry, helper execution, and helper integrity checks.

## Validation

Please list the commands you ran:

- [ ] `npm run compile`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit`
- [ ] Windows/helper changes only: `npm test`
- [ ] Packaging changes only: `npx @vscode/vsce ls --no-dependencies`

